context: Tests whether the agent implements a two-column PDP layout (gallery left, info right), accessible variant selectors with disabled-not-hidden unavailable options, a sticky add-to-cart bar using IntersectionObserver, compare-at price strikethrough display, and URL variant state via replaceState.

checklist.name: Two-column CSS grid
checklist.description: The page layout uses CSS grid with grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr (or equivalent equal-width two columns) for desktop

checklist.name: Gallery left, info right
checklist.description: The gallery/image section appears as the first column (left) and the product info section as the second column (right) in the desktop layout

checklist.name: Mobile single column
checklist.description: A media query at max-width: 768px (or similar breakpoint) collapses the layout to a single column

checklist.name: Unavailable variants disabled
checklist.description: Out-of-stock variant option buttons are rendered with the disabled attribute (or aria-disabled), NOT removed from the DOM

checklist.name: Variant fieldset/legend
checklist.description: Each option group (Color, Size) is wrapped in a <fieldset> with a <legend> element

checklist.name: Variant radiogroup role
checklist.description: The container of variant option buttons has role="radiogroup" and each button has role="radio" with aria-checked

checklist.name: IntersectionObserver sticky ATC
checklist.description: StickyAddToCart uses IntersectionObserver to watch the main add-to-cart button and shows only when that button is NOT intersecting the viewport

checklist.name: Sticky ATC hidden on desktop
checklist.description: The sticky add-to-cart bar is hidden on desktop screens via a CSS media query (min-width: 769px or similar) with display: none

checklist.name: Compare-at price strikethrough
checklist.description: The original/compare-at price ($249.00) is rendered with a text-decoration: line-through style alongside the sale price ($189.00)

checklist.name: URL variant replaceState
checklist.description: When a variant option is changed, history.replaceState (or equivalent) is called to update the URL with the selected variant identifier

checklist.name: Max-width constraint
checklist.description: The page grid container has a max-width set (e.g., 1280px or similar) to prevent excessive stretching on very wide screens

checklist.name: Sticky ATC fixed position
checklist.description: The sticky add-to-cart bar uses position: fixed with bottom: 0 and spans the full viewport width
